title: The Letter That Made Me Cry in the Street
theme: A letter, a street, tears, and fragile hope.
sceneDescription: Chapter 7 is presented as a privacy-safe stylized memoir scene using paper pages, letter texture, soft handwritten-memory movement. The Living Scene Layer supports the memory without changing the manuscript text or recreating real people photorealistically.
privacyNotes: Use privacy-safe, stylized, non-photorealistic character presence. Do not create final faces unless explicitly approved.
